included_features: Cloud and local smoke test docs
patch_changes: Promoted beta feedback workflow into v0.6.0-beta.1 patch release.
Kept v0.6.0-beta model algorithms and project workflow unchanged.
test_summary: version, beta CLI, healthcheck, project workflow, report export, templates validate, tutorial checklist, pytest, and Streamlit startup verified for v0.6.0-beta.1
warnings: Patch release; no model algorithms changed.
GEE, SWMM, and OpenHydroNet backends remain environment-dependent optional integrations.
OpenHydroNet prepares inputs only and does not train or run large inference.
known_limitations: GEE, SWMM, and OpenHydroNet backends remain optional environment-dependent integrations.
OpenHydroNet support prepares input packages only and does not train or run large inference.
Online Streamlit is for demo and feedback; full workflows are recommended locally.
